values.name: al2023-ami-ecs-hvm-2023.0.20260414-kernel-6.1-x86_64

values.description: Allow inbound from ALB only; allow all outbound
values.name: hello-world-dev-ec2-sg

alb_dns_name.description: ALB DNS name — application entry point.

ecr_repository_url.description: ECR repository URL for docker push.

rds_secret_arn.description: Secrets Manager ARN containing RDS credentials.

autoscaling_group_name.description: Name of the Auto Scaling Group

iam_role_arn.description: ARN of the EC2 IAM role

security_group_id.description: ID of the EC2 security group

description.constant_value: Allow inbound from ALB only; allow all outbound

alb_security_group_id.description: Security group ID of the ALB — grants inbound access to EC2 (empty string disables ALB ingress rule)

key_name.description: EC2 key pair name (optional — prefer SSM Session Manager)

target_group_arns.description: ALB target group ARNs to attach the ASG to

user_data.description: User data script (raw text — will be base64-encoded)

repository_url.description: ECR repository URL — use in docker push/pull commands

image_tag_mutability.description: Tag mutability: MUTABLE or IMMUTABLE (use IMMUTABLE in production)

max_image_count.description: Maximum number of images to retain (lifecycle policy)

scan_on_push.description: Enable automated image vulnerability scanning on push

invoke_arn.description: Invoke ARN (used for API Gateway integration)

role_arn.description: ARN of the Lambda IAM role

environment_variables.description: Environment variables injected into the function

function_name.description: Function name suffix — full name is <project>-<env>-<function_name>

log_retention_days.description: CloudWatch log group retention in days

memory_size.description: Memory allocated to the function in MB

alb_dns_name.description: DNS name of the ALB — use as the application entry point

alb_zone_id.description: Hosted zone ID of the ALB (for Route 53 alias records)

security_group_id.description: ID of the ALB security group

deregistration_delay.description: Seconds to wait before deregistering a target

public_subnet_ids.description: Public subnet IDs for the ALB

target_port.description: Port on which EC2 targets receive traffic

nat_gateway_id.description: ID of the NAT gateway (null when enable_nat_gateway = false)

azs.description: Availability zones — must align with subnet_cidr lists

enable_nat_gateway.description: Provision a single NAT gateway for private subnet egress (incurs cost)

private_subnet_cidrs.description: CIDR blocks for private subnets — one entry per AZ

project.description: Project name used as a resource prefix

public_subnet_cidrs.description: CIDR blocks for public subnets — one entry per AZ

secret_arn.description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing DB credentials

security_group_id.description: ID of the RDS security group

description.constant_value: Allow PostgreSQL inbound from permitted security groups only

allowed_security_group_ids.description: Security group IDs permitted to connect on port 5432

backup_retention_period.description: Days to retain automated backups (0 disables backups)

deletion_protection.description: Enable deletion protection (set true for production)

multi_az.description: Enable Multi-AZ deployment (higher availability, higher cost)

skip_final_snapshot.description: Skip final snapshot on destroy (set false for production)

subnet_ids.description: Subnet IDs for the DB subnet group (≥ 2 AZs required)

app_port.description: Port the application listens on (used by ALB and security groups).

aws_region.description: AWS region to deploy resources into.

azs.description: Availability zones to spread subnets across.

db_name.description: Initial database name created on the RDS instance.

db_username.description: Master username for the RDS instance.

enable_compute.description: Create the EC2 Auto Scaling Group and related resources.

enable_lambda.description: Create the Lambda function and related resources.

enable_load_balancer.description: Create the Application Load Balancer and related resources.

enable_nat_gateway.description: Create a NAT gateway so private subnets can reach the internet.

enable_rds.description: Create the RDS PostgreSQL instance and related resources.

instance_type.description: EC2 instance type for the Auto Scaling Group.

lambda_function_name.description: Logical name of the Lambda function (appended to project-env prefix).

private_subnet_cidrs.description: List of CIDR blocks for private subnets (one per AZ).

project.description: Project name used as a prefix for all resource names.

public_subnet_cidrs.description: List of CIDR blocks for public subnets (one per AZ).
